CustomField.description: Automatically calculated end date based on start date, metric and count.
CustomField.formula: CASE(Time_Period_Metric__c, "Days", Start_Date__c + Time_Period_Count__c, "Weeks", Start_Date__c + (7 * Time_Period_Count__c), "Months", ADDMONTHS(Start_Date__c, Time_Period_Count__c), "Quarters", ADDMONTHS(Start_Date__c, 3 * Time_Period_Count__c), ADDMONTHS(Start_Date__c, Time_Period_Count__c) )
CustomField.label: End Date
